info.title: Archive Suite API Contract
info.description: Framework-neutral API contract for the Laravel API and Next.js migration. The current Node server is the reference implementation until Laravel reaches parity.

get.summary: Server and backend health

post.summary: Authenticate a user

get.summary: Return the current authenticated user

post.summary: Rotate the HttpOnly refresh cookie and issue a new access token
Revoke the current session

Read a single record by id

delete.summary: Delete a private archive record note

post.summary: Create a team comment for an archive record

Generate an admin-only operational compliance report from audit events
Export filtered operational compliance evidence as CSV without audit payloads
Return the local catalog-only plugin marketplace with permission review metadata

200.description: Plugin catalog and permission review model

post.summary: Bulk upsert records for migration and sync compatibility

token.description: One-time invitation token; only returned at creation time
